summary: Iteration 5: Tested code-review findings for Hook-Dependencies, Complexity, and TS-Coverage. All backend tests pass (9/9). Frontend TypeScript compiles without errors. UI components (QualityPage, FindingList, LiveTerminal) render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: useWebSocket.ts: Module-level constants (WEBSOCKET_TIMEOUT_MS, WebSocketCtor, MessageEventCtor, backendUrl) in useCallback/useEffect dependency arrays are unnecessary but harmless - they never change. Consider removing for cleaner code.

useSessionBootstrap.ts: apiFetch (module import) and cancelledRef (ref) in dependency arrays are stable and don't need to be listed - ESLint exhaustive-deps may flag this but it's technically correct.
LiveTerminal.tsx: terminalRef in useEffect deps (line 18) is unnecessary since refs are stable objects - the current pattern works but could be simplified.
QualityPage.tsx: Well-refactored into 4 sub-components (QualityHeader, QualityChecks, QualityMetricsGrid, QualityReviewCycles) with proper TypeScript interfaces.
FindingList.tsx: Good TypeScript explicitness with FindingColumn and FindingRowProps interfaces, explicit type annotations on arrays and map callbacks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 files reviewed for hook-dependency compliance. useWebSocket.ts heartbeat and connection effects work correctly. useSessionBootstrap.ts bootstrap callback is stable. LiveTerminal.tsx auto-scroll works. QualityPage.tsx successfully refactored into smaller components. FindingList.tsx has proper TypeScript coverage. WebSocket connection shows 'Connected' status in LiveTerminal.

code_review.useWebSocket.ts: PASS - hook dependencies compliant, heartbeat + connection effects stable
code_review.LiveTerminal.tsx: PASS - terminalRef dependency present, auto-scroll works
code_review.QualityPage.tsx: PASS - refactored into 4 smaller components without function loss
code_review.FindingList.tsx: PASS - higher TypeScript explicitness, no UI regressions
